item.title: When is the next results date for Den Networks Ltd?
item.description: Den Networks Ltd will announce its results on April 14, 2026. Time: Apr 08 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: Arvind Ltd Joins Mojo Stocks: A Strategic Addition to Garments & Apparels Small Cap Portfolio
item.description: Arvind Ltd has been added to the esteemed Mojo Stocks list as of 8 April 2026, marking a significant endorsement of its robust financial performance and strategic positioning within the garments and apparels sector. This small-cap stock, priced at Rs 381.65 at the time of inclusion, demonstrates compelling fundamentals and growth prospects that align well with long-term investment strategies focused on quality and momentum. Time: Apr 08 2026 08:50 PM IST

item.title: Are Aqylon Nexus Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Aqylon Nexus Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a net loss of ₹1.86 crores and a 97.25% drop in revenue, indicating severe operational challenges and potential insolvency. Despite a 267.98% stock return over the past year, the company's financial performance suggests a critical need for restructuring or capital infusion. Time: Apr 08 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Asahi India Glass Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Asahi India Glass Ltd (Stock ID: 963427) has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum. Investors and market watchers should carefully analyse the implications of this event amid the company’s current financial and market performance. Time: Apr 08 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Rain Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Rain Industries Ltd, a small-cap player in the petrochemicals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about long-term weakness amid already challenging market conditions. Time: Apr 08 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 8 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others remain inconclusive or mildly bearish, raising questions about the signal’s reliability. Time: Apr 08 2026 06:00 PM IST
